title: Voxel Strides
description: Gamified iOS productivity app that transforms daily tasks into an interactive adventure — shortlisted at IndeHub, India's biggest Apple platform hackathon.
longDescription:
Voxel Strides transforms task management into an interactive adventure: complete tasks, earn collectibles, and watch your character advance along a Duolingo-style journey path. Built with SwiftUI and SwiftData for full on-device persistence and offline support.

Key features: an AR companion that celebrates task completions in your physical environment using ARKit, a Core ML-powered planning agent that deconstructs complex user goals into actionable steps, a Pomodoro-style Focus Quest mode, and an Apple Music integration that plays celebration audio on task completion. Shortlisted at IndeHub Hackathon — India's biggest Apple platform hackathon — out of 300+ participants.
